top_signals.title: Xeneta Weekly Ocean Container Shipping Market Update: Rates Now 80% Higher Than the Pre-Iran War Period
top_signals.summary: Early Xeneta data shows average spot rates on the Transpacific trade into US West Coast at the start of June are set to exceed +80% above pre-Middle East conflict levels. The Xeneta Weekly Ocean Container Shipping Market Update provides data and intelligence including the latest freight rate and capacity movements across global trades with supporting ...

top_signals.summary: China and the United Kingdom have voiced a strong desire and support for deeper economic engagement to unlock new growth opportunities in bilateral cooperation, as the two countries move to develop a long-term and consistent comprehensive strategic partnership. top_signals.title: Vanadium Batteries Could Break Lithium's Grip on Energy Storage
top_signals.summary: next-gen battery systems that form the future of energy storage and break lithium’s chokehold on global clean energy tech supply chains. The batteries show particular promise for energy storage applications, and could soon be a promising solution for long-term energy storage as energy grids become increasingly reliant on variable energy sources like wind and solar power. VRFBs function by storing energy in liquid electrolytes. These liquid electrolytes contain vanadium ions in four different states of oxidation, kept in two separate tanks.…

top_signals.title: CYTUR Receives Digital Twin Ready AiP from Lloyd’s Register
top_signals.summary: CYTUR Inc., a maritime cybersecurity specialist, today announced that its naval and commercial vessel cybersecurity solution ‘CYTUR-MG (CYTUR Maritime Guard)’ has received Approval in Principle (AiP) for Digital Twin Ready in the cybersecurity domain from the Lloyd’s Register (LR). The approval is particularly significant as it represents an independent technical assessment of operational-stage cyber risk ...
